```lua
        burst = opts.burst or 20,            -- Bucket capacity (max burst)
        prefix = opts.prefix or "tb:",
    }
    setmetatable(self, mt)
    return self
end

function _M:allow(key)
    local store = self.store
    local full_key = self.prefix .. key
    local now = ngx.now()

    -- Get bucket state
    local data_str = store:get(full_key)
    local data = data_str and cjson.decode(data_str) or {
        last_refill_time = now,
        tokens = self.burst,                 -- Initially full bucket
    }

    -- Refill tokens
    local elapsed = now - data.last_refill_time
    local new_tokens = elapsed * self.rate
    data.tokens = math.min(self.burst, data.tokens + new_tokens)
    data.last_refill_time = now

    -- Consume token
    if data.tokens < 1 then
        store:set(full_key, cjson.encode(data), 3600)
        return false, data.tokens
    end

    data.tokens = data.tokens - 1
    store:set(full_key, cjson.encode(data), 3600)

    return true, data.tokens
end

return _M
```

```nginx
lua_shared_dict token_bucket_store 10m;

location /api/token-bucket {
    access_by_lua_block {
        local tb = require("token_bucket").new({
            store = ngx.shared.token_bucket_store,
            rate = 10,               -- Replenish 10 tokens per second
            burst = 20,              -- Accumulate max 20 tokens (burst limit)
        })

        local allowed, remaining = tb:allow(ngx.var.binary_remote_addr)
        ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Limit"] = 20
        ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Remaining"] = tostring(math.floor(remaining))

        if not allowed then
            ngx.status = 429
            ngx.say('{"error":"too many requests","retry_after":',
                    string.format("%.2f", (1 - remaining) / 10), '}')
            return ngx.exit(429)
        end
    }

    proxy_pass http://backend;
}
```

### Use Cases

| Scenario | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| APIs allowing burst traffic | E.g., users rapidly clicking buttons |
| CDN/edge nodes | Balance user experience and system protection |
| Microservice calls | Allow short bursts but control average rate |

### Pros and Cons

| Pros | Cons |
|------|------|
| Allows reasonable bursts | Needs time to recover after burst |
| Intuitive and easy-to-understand parameters | Long idle periods may cause large initial burst |
| Widely adopted (Google Guava, Envoy, etc.) | Requires proper rate and burst configuration |

---

## V. Algorithm Comparison

```
Scenario: Limit 10 req/s, burst test

Fixed Window:
████████████████████████████████████████████████  (2x burst at boundary!)

Sliding Window:
████████████████████████                          (Smooth, no boundary spikes)

Leaky Bucket:
████████████████                                (Forced constant output, peak shaving)

Token Bucket:
████████████████████████████                     (Allows burst, then steady rate)
```

| Dimension | Fixed Window | Sliding Window | Leaky Bucket | Token Bucket |
|-----------|-------------|----------------|--------------|--------------|
| **Precision** | ⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| **Burst handling** | ❌ 2x at boundary | ✅ Smooth | ❌ Forced constant | ✅ Controlled burst |
| **Memory** | O(1) | O(N) | O(1) | O(1) |
| **Complexity** | Low | Medium | Medium | Medium |
| **Typical use** | Coarse limiting | Precise limiting | Backend protection | API gateway |

---

## VI. OpenResty Built-in Rate Limiting Modules

Besides hand-written Lua algorithms, OpenResty provides built-in modules:

### 1. `limit_req` (Token Bucket Based)

```nginx
http {
    # Define rate limit zone: $binary_remote_addr as key
    # rate=10r/s means average 10 requests per second
    # zone=10m allocates 10MB shared memory (~160k states)
    limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=ip_limit:10m rate=10r/s;

    # burst=20 allows up to 20 burst requests to queue
    # nodelay returns 429 immediately when burst exceeded (no queue waiting)
    limit_req_status 429;

    server {
        location /api/builtin {
            # Apply rate limiting
            limit_req zone=ip_limit burst=20 nodelay;

            # Custom response body
            limit_req_log_level warn;

            proxy_pass http://backend;
        }
    }
}
```

### 2. `limit_conn` (Connection Limiting)

```nginx
http {
    # Limit concurrent connections per IP
    limit_conn_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=conn_limit:10m;
    # Limit total connections per server
    limit_conn_zone $server_name zone=server_limit:10m;

    server {
        # Max 5 concurrent connections per IP
        limit_conn conn_limit 5;
        # Max 100 concurrent connections site-wide
        limit_conn server_limit 100;

        location /api/conn {
            limit_conn_status 429;
            proxy_pass http://backend;
        }
    }
}
```

### 3. `limit_req` vs Lua Implementation

| Feature | `limit_req` Module | Lua Implementation |
|---------|-------------------|-------------------|
| Performance | C-level, extremely fast | Lua-level, slightly slower but sufficient |
| Flexibility | Config-driven, limited extension | Programmable, arbitrary logic |
| Dynamic config | Requires reload | Runtime adjustable |
| Distributed limiting | Not supported | Can integrate with Redis |
| Complex conditions | Only supports variables as keys | Supports arbitrary business logic |

---

## VII. Distributed Rate Limiting (Redis Version)

Single-instance rate limiting is insufficient for multi-instance deployments; Redis is needed for global rate limiting:

### Redis + Lua Script Sliding Window

```lua
-- redis_sliding_window.lua
local redis_lib = require "resty.redis"
local red = redis_lib:new()
red:set_timeouts(1000, 1000, 1000)
local ok, err = red:connect("127.0.0.1", 6379)
if not ok then
    ngx.log(ngx.ERR, "redis connect failed: ", err)
    return ngx.exit(500)
end

local key = "ratelimit:" .. ngx.var.remote_addr
local now = ngx.now()
local window = 10                   -- 10-second window
local limit = 100                   -- 100 requests

-- Redis Lua script: Atomic operation
local script = [[
local key = KEYS[1]
local now = tonumber(ARGV[1])
local window = tonumber(ARGV[2])
local limit = tonumber(ARGV[3])

-- Remove old records outside window
redis.call('ZREMRANGEBYSCORE', key, 0, now - window)

-- Count requests in current window
local current = redis.call('ZCARD', key)

if current < limit then
    -- Record current request (member=unique ID, score=timestamp)
    redis.call('ZADD', key, now, now .. ':' .. math.random())
    redis.call('EXPIRE', key, window + 1)
    return {current + 1, limit - current - 1}
else
    return {current, 0}
end
]]

local result, err = red:eval(script, 1, key, now, window, limit)
if not result then
    ngx.log(ngx.ERR, "redis eval failed: ", err)
    return ngx.exit(500)
end

local count = result[1]
local remaining = result[2]

ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Limit"] = limit
ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Remaining"] = remaining

if tonumber(count) > limit then
    ngx.status = 429
    ngx.say('{"error":"rate limit exceeded"}')
    return ngx.exit(429)
end
```

### Redis Token Bucket (RedisCell Algorithm)

If using Redis 7+ or the RedisCell module, you can use efficient token bucket directly:

```bash
# Install RedisCell module
redis-cli MODULE LOAD /path/to/libredis_cell.so
```

```lua
-- Use RedisCell's CL.THROTTLE command
local key = "throttle:" .. ngx.var.remote_addr
local max_burst = 20
local tokens_per_sec = 10
local result = red:call("CL.THROTTLE", key, max_burst, tokens_per_sec, 10, 1)

-- result: {0/1, total_tokens, remaining, retry_after, is_retryable}
-- 0 = allowed, 1 = rejected
if result[1] == 1 then
    ngx.header["Retry-After"] = result[4]
    return ngx.exit(429)
end
```

---

## VIII. Practice: Combined Rate Limiting Solution

Production environments typically use **multi-layer rate limiting**:

```nginx
http {
    lua_shared_dict limit_store 10m;
    lua_shared_dict blacklist_store 1m;

    init_by_lua_block {
        require("init_rate_limit")     -- Initialize rate limiter
    }

    # Layer 1: Nginx built-in limiting (outermost, highest performance)
    limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=l1_ip:10m rate=100r/s;
    limit_req_zone $server_name zone=l1_global:10m rate=1000r/s;

    server {
        # Layer 2: IP blacklist
        access_by_lua_block {
            local blacklisted = ngx.shared.blacklist_store:get(
                ngx.var.binary_remote_addr
            )
            if blacklisted then
                ngx.log(ngx.WARN, "blocked blacklisted ip: ",
                        ngx.var.remote_addr)
                return ngx.exit(403)
            end
        }

        # Layer 3: User-level token bucket limiting
        access_by_lua_block {
            local limiter = require("token_bucket").new({
                store = ngx.shared.limit_store,
                rate = 30,
                burst = 50,
            })
            local user_id = ngx.req.get_headers()["X-User-ID"]
            local key = user_id or ngx.var.remote_addr

            local ok, remaining = limiter:allow(key)
            if not ok then
                ngx.log(ngx.WARN, "user rate limited: ", key)
                return ngx.exit(429)
            end
        }

        # Layer 4: Endpoint-level limiting (for sensitive endpoints)
        location /api/sensitive {
            limit_req zone=l1_ip burst=5 nodelay;    -- More strict

            access_by_lua_block {
                local limiter = require("leaky_bucket").new({
                    store = ngx.shared.limit_store,
                    capacity = 10,
                    rate = 2,                            -- Extremely strict
                })
                local ok = limiter:allow(ngx.var.remote_addr)
                if not ok then
                    return ngx.exit(429)
                end
            }

            proxy_pass http://backend;
        }

        location /api/normal {
            limit_req zone=l1_ip burst=20 nodelay;
            proxy_pass http://backend;
        }
    }
}
```

### Multi-layer Architecture Diagram

```
                    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
                    │           User Request               │
                    └──────────────┬──────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
              │  L1: Nginx limit_req (IP-level coarse)     │  ← 100 req/s per IP
              └────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
              │  L2: Blacklist check (IP/User direct deny) │
              └────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
              │  L3: User-level token bucket (30/s+burst50)│  ← Business dimension
              └────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
              │  L4: Endpoint-level limiting (stricter)     │  ← Endpoint dimension
              └────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
                    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
                    │           Backend Service             │
                    └─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## IX. Parameter Tuning Recommendations

| Scenario | Recommended Algorithm | rate Suggestion | burst Suggestion |
|----------|----------------------|-----------------|-----------------|
| Public API | Token bucket | Based on SLA | rate × 2 ~ 5 |
| User login endpoint | Sliding window | 5-10/min | - |
| Payment/Order | Leaky bucket | 1-3/s | capacity = rate |
| File upload | Connection limit | - | 1-3 concurrent |
| Search endpoint | Fixed window | 30-60/s | - |

---

## X. Monitoring and Alerting

```lua
-- Add monitoring reporting in rate limiting logic
function _M:allow_with_metrics(key)
    local allowed, info = self:allow(key)

    -- Report rate limiting metrics to Prometheus
    local metrics = {
        name = "rate_limit_total",
        labels = "endpoint=\"" .. ngx.var.uri .. "\",result=\""
                 .. (allowed and "pass" or "rejected") .. "\"",
        value = 1,
    }
    -- Write to shared memory for Prometheus exporter to scrape
    local metric_store = ngx.shared.metrics_store
    local metric_key = metrics.name .. "{" .. metrics.labels .. "}"
    metric_store:incr(metric_key, metrics.value, 0, 60)

    return allowed, info
end
```

---

## Summary

| Algorithm | Core Idea | Selection Guide |
|-----------|-----------|-----------------|
| **Fixed Window** | Independent time-slice counting | Simple scenarios, low precision requirements |
| **Sliding Window** | Dynamic window statistics | Scenarios requiring precise control |
| **Leaky Bucket** | Constant output rate | Protect backend services, force smoothing |
| **Token Bucket** | Constant input rate | API scenarios allowing bursts |

> Production recommendation: **Nginx built-in module as first line of defense + Lua custom logic for fine-grained control + Redis for distributed global rate limiting**.

title: OpenResty 限流策略与算法实现
content:
## 为什么需要限流

在高并发场景下，系统资源（CPU、内存、连接数、数据库连接池）是有限的。如果没有限流保护，突发流量可能导致：

- 服务雪崩：后端服务被压垮，影响所有用户
- 数据库过载：大量请求同时打到 DB，导致慢查询堆积
- 带宽浪费：恶意爬虫或异常流量消耗带宽资源

限流的核心目标：**在保证服务质量的前提下，尽可能多地处理合法请求**。

---

## 一、固定窗口计数器 (Fixed Window)

### 算法原理

将时间划分为固定的窗口（如 1 秒、1 分钟），每个窗口内独立计数。

```
时间轴: |----[窗口1]----|----[窗口2]----|----[窗口3]----|
        ↑ 100次请求     ↑ 重置为0      ↑ 又100次
```

### OpenResty 实现

```nginx
# 共享内存定义
lua_shared_dict limit_count_store 10m;

server {
    location /api/fixed-window {
        access_by_lua_block {
            local limit_store = ngx.shared.limit_count_store
            local key = ngx.var.remote_addr
            local limit = 100          -- 窗口内最大请求数
            local window = 1           -- 窗口大小(秒)

            local current, err = limit_store:get(key)
            if not current then
                current = 0
            end

            if current >= limit then
                return ngx.exit(429)   -- Too Many Requests
            end

            local ok, err = limit_store:incr(key, 1, 0, window)
            if not ok then
                ngx.log(ngx.ERR, "failed to increment counter: ", err)
                return ngx.exit(500)
            end
        }

        proxy_pass http://backend;
    }
}
```

### 优缺点

| 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|
| 实现简单，性能高 | **临界问题**：窗口边界处可能产生 2 倍突发 |
| 内存占用恒定 | 无法应对突发流量平滑 |

> **临界问题示例**：假设限制 100 次/分钟，在 `00:59` 发了 100 次，`01:00` 窗口重置又发了 100 次，1 秒内实际处理了 200 次。

---

## 二、滑动窗口计数器 (Sliding Window)

### 算法原理

不按固定边界切分，而是记录每个请求的时间戳，统计**最近 N 毫秒/秒**内的请求数量。

```
当前时刻: T=1500ms, 窗口=1000ms

请求时间戳队列:
[300, 500, 800, 1200, 1400, 1450]

滑动窗口范围: [500, 1500]
有效请求数: 4 (1200, 1400, 1450 + 当前请求)

过期请求: 300, 500 (已移出窗口)
```

### OpenResty 实现

```lua
-- sliding_window.lua
local _M = { _VERSION = '1.0' }
local mt = { __index = _M }

function _M.new(opts)
    opts = opts or {}
    local self = {
        store = opts.store or ngx.shared.limit_store,
        limit = opts.limit or 100,
        window = opts.window or 1,       -- 窗口大小(秒)
        prefix = opts.prefix or "sw:",
    }
    setmetatable(self, mt)
    return self
end

function _M:allow(key)
    local store = self.store
    local full_key = self.prefix .. key
    local now = ngx.now() * 1000        -- 转毫秒
    local window_ms = self.window * 1000

    -- 获取历史请求列表
    local history = store:get(full_key)
    local requests = {}

    if history then
        requests = cjson.decode(history) or {}
    end

    -- 清理过期请求(滑动移除窗口外的记录)
    local valid_requests = {}
    for _, ts in ipairs(requests) do
        if ts > (now - window_ms) then
            table.insert(valid_requests, ts)
        end
    end

    -- 判断是否超限
    if #valid_requests >= self.limit then
        return false, #valid_requests
    end

    -- 记录当前请求
    table.insert(valid_requests, now)
    local ok, err = store:set(full_key,
                              cjson.encode(valid_requests),
                              self.window + 1)   -- 多存1秒防止过早清理
    if not ok then
        ngx.log(ngx.ERR, "sliding window set failed: ", err)
        return false, -1
    end

    return true, #valid_requests
end

return _M
```

```nginx
-- 使用方式
local sliding = require("sliding_window").new({
    store = ngx.shared.sliding_store,
    limit = 50,
    window = 10,           -- 10秒窗口
})

local allowed, count = sliding:allow(ngx.var.remote_addr)
if not allowed then
    ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Limit"] = 50
    ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Remaining"] = 0
    return ngx.exit(429)
end
ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Remaining"] = 50 - count
```

### 优缺点

| 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|
| 解决了临界问题 | 内存占用随请求量增长 |
| 流量控制更精确 | 需要存储每个请求的时间戳 |
| 支持动态调整窗口 | 编解码 JSON 有一定 CPU 开销 |

---

## 三、漏桶算法 (Leaky Bucket)

### 算法原理

想象一个底部有孔的桶：
- **请求（水）**从顶部注入桶中
- **水以恒定速率**从底部漏出（处理请求）
- 如果桶满了，新请求被拒绝

```
        ┌──────────────┐
  入流量 │              │ ← 桶容量(capacity): 100
  ──────→│     漏桶      │
         │              │ ↓ 出流量(漏率/rate): 10 req/s (恒定)
         └──────┬───────┘
                ↓
           处理请求
```

**核心特点**：输出速率恒定，能够**强制平滑流量**。

### OpenResty 实现

```lua
-- leaky_bucket.lua
local _M = { _VERSION = '1.0' }
local mt = { __index = _M }

function _M.new(opts)
    opts = opts or {}
    local self = {
        store = opts.store,
        capacity = opts.capacity or 100,    -- 桶容量
        rate = opts.rate or 10,             -- 漏出速率(每秒)
        prefix = opts.prefix or "lb:",
    }
    setmetatable(self, mt)
    return self
end

function _M:allow(key)
    local store = self.store
    local full_key = self.prefix .. key
    local now = ngx.now()

    -- 获取桶状态: {last_leak_time=..., current_water=...}
    local data_str = store:get(full_key)
    local data = data_str and cjson.decode(data_str) or {
        last_leak_time = now,
        current_water = 0,
    }

    -- 计算漏出的水量
    local elapsed = now - data.last_leak_time
    local leak_amount = elapsed * self.rate
    data.current_water = math.max(0, data.current_water - leak_amount)
    data.last_leak_time = now

    -- 尝试加水(接收请求)
    if data.current_water >= self.capacity then
        -- 桶满了，保存状态并拒绝
        store:set(full_key, cjson.encode(data), 3600)
        return false, data.current_water
    end

    -- 加1单位水(接收1个请求)
    data.current_water = data.current_water + 1
    store:set(full_key, cjson.encode(data), 3600)

    return true, data.current_water
end

return _M
```

```nginx
lua_shared_dict leaky_bucket_store 10m;

location /api/leaky-bucket {
    access_by_lua_block {
        local lb = require("leaky_bucket").new({
            store = ngx.shared.leaky_bucket_store,
            capacity = 50,       -- 桶最多存50个请求
            rate = 10,           -- 每秒处理10个
        })

        local allowed, water = lb:allow(ngx.var.binary_remote_addr)
        if not allowed then
            ngx.status = 429
            ngx.say('{"error":"rate limited","bucket":', water, '}')
            return ngx.exit(429)
        end
    }

    proxy_pass http://backend;
}
```

### 适用场景

| 场景 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| 保护下游服务 | 强制限制到后端的速率，防止打挂 |
| 流量整形 | 将突发流量平滑为恒定输出 |
| API 网关限流 | 保证后端服务稳定 |

### 优缺点

| 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|
| 输出速率恒定，适合保护后端 | 无法处理突发流量（即使桶有空余） |
| 实现相对简单 | 需要精确计算漏水速率 |
| 内存占用固定 | 参数调节需要经验 |

---

## 四、令牌桶算法 (Token Bucket)

### 算法原理

系统以**恒定速率**向桶中放入令牌：
- 每个请求消耗 **1 个令牌**
- 有令牌 → 允许通过
- 无令牌 → 拒绝或等待
- 桶满时令牌溢出丢弃

```
         令牌生成器(恒定速率)
              │
              ↓ (每秒放入 rate 个令牌)
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │                  │ ← 桶容量(burst): 最大令牌数
    │     令牌桶        │
    │  🪙🪙🪙🪙🪙🪙   │
    │  🪙🪙🪙          │
    └──────┬───────────┘
           ↓
    请求到来 → 取走1个令牌 → 有令牌? ✅ 通过 / ❌ 拒绝
```

**核心特点**：允许一定程度的**突发流量**（桶中积累的令牌）。

### OpenResty 实现

```lua
-- token_bucket.lua
local _M = { _VERSION = '1.0' }
local mt = { __index = _M }

function _M.new(opts)
    opts = opts or {}
    local self = {
        store = opts.store,
        rate = opts.rate or 10,             -- 令牌生成速率(每秒)
        burst = opts.burst or 20,            -- 桶容量(最大突发)
        prefix = opts.prefix or "tb:",
    }
    setmetatable(self, mt)
    return self
end

function _M:allow(key)
    local store = self.store
    local full_key = self.prefix .. key
    local now = ngx.now()

    -- 获取桶状态
    local data_str = store:get(full_key)
    local data = data_str and cjson.decode(data_str) or {
        last_refill_time = now,
        tokens = self.burst,                 -- 初始满桶
    }

    -- 补充令牌
    local elapsed = now - data.last_refill_time
    local new_tokens = elapsed * self.rate
    data.tokens = math.min(self.burst, data.tokens + new_tokens)
    data.last_refill_time = now

    -- 消耗令牌
    if data.tokens < 1 then
        store:set(full_key, cjson.encode(data), 3600)
        return false, data.tokens
    end

    data.tokens = data.tokens - 1
    store:set(full_key, cjson.encode(data), 3600)

    return true, data.tokens
end

return _M
```

```nginx
lua_shared_dict token_bucket_store 10m;

location /api/token-bucket {
    access_by_lua_block {
        local tb = require("token_bucket").new({
            store = ngx.shared.token_bucket_store,
            rate = 10,               -- 每秒补充10个令牌
            burst = 20,              -- 最多积累20个令牌(突发上限)
        })

        local allowed, remaining = tb:allow(ngx.var.binary_remote_addr)
        ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Limit"] = 20
        ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Remaining"] = tostring(math.floor(remaining))

        if not allowed then
            ngx.status = 429
            ngx.say('{"error":"too many requests","retry_after":',
                    string.format("%.2f", (1 - remaining) / 10), '}')
            return ngx.exit(429)
        end
    }

    proxy_pass http://backend;
}
```

### 适用场景

| 场景 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| 允许突发流量的API | 如用户快速连续点击按钮 |
| CDN/边缘节点 | 平衡用户体验和系统保护 |
| 微服务调用 | 允许短时突发但控制平均速率 |

### 优缺点

| 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|
| 允许合理突发 | 突发后需要时间恢复 |
| 参数直观易懂 | 长时间空闲后首次请求可能触发大突发 |
| 业界广泛采用(Google Guava, Envoy等) | 需要合理设置 rate 和 burst |

---

## 五、四种算法对比

```
场景: 限制 10 req/s, 突发测试

固定窗口:
████████████████████████████████████████████████  (边界突发2倍!)

滑动窗口:
████████████████████████                          (平滑,无边界突变)

漏桶:
████████████████                                (强制恒定输出,削峰填谷)

令牌桶:
████████████████████████████                     (允许突发,然后匀速)
```

| 维度 | 固定窗口 | 滑动窗口 | 漏桶 | 令牌桶 |
|------|---------|---------|------|--------|
| **精度** | ⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| **突发处理** | ❌ 边界2倍 | ✅ 平滑 | ❌ 强制恒定 | ✅ 允许可控突发 |
| **内存占用** | O(1) | O(N) | O(1) | O(1) |
| **实现复杂度** | 低 | 中 | 中 | 中 |
| **典型场景** | 粗粒度限流 | 精确限流 | 保护后端 | API网关 |

---

## 六、OpenResty 内置限流模块

除了 Lua 手写算法，OpenResty 还提供了内置模块：

### 1. `limit_req` (基于令牌桶)

```nginx
http {
    # 定义限流区域: $binary_remote_addr 作为key
    # rate=10r/s 表示平均每秒10个请求
    # zone=10m 分配10MB共享内存(约16万个状态)
    limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=ip_limit:10m rate=10r/s;

    # burst=20 允许突发最多20个请求排队
    # nodelay 超过burst立即返回429(不排队等待)
    limit_req_status 429;

    server {
        location /api/builtin {
            # 应用限流
            limit_req zone=ip_limit burst=20 nodelay;

            # 自定义响应体
            limit_req_log_level warn;

            proxy_pass http://backend;
        }
    }
}
```

### 2. `limit_conn` (连接数限制)

```nginx
http {
    # 按IP限制并发连接数
    limit_conn_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=conn_limit:10m;
    # 按服务器限制总连接数
    limit_conn_zone $server_name zone=server_limit:10m;

    server {
        # 单IP最大5个并发连接
        limit_conn conn_limit 5;
        # 全站最大100个并发连接
        limit_conn server_limit 100;

        location /api/conn {
            limit_conn_status 429;
            proxy_pass http://backend;
        }
    }
}
```

### 3. `limit_req` vs Lua 实现

| 特性 | `limit_req` 模块 | Lua 实现 |
|------|-----------------|----------|
| 性能 | C 层级，极快 | Lua 层级，稍慢但足够 |
| 灵活性 | 配置驱动，有限扩展 | 可编程，任意逻辑 |
| 动态配置 | 需要 reload | 运行时可变 |
| 分布式限流 | 不支持 | 可结合 Redis |
| 复杂条件 | 仅支持变量作为key | 支持任意业务逻辑 |

---

## 七、分布式限流 (Redis 版本)

单机限流在多实例部署下不够用，需要借助 Redis 实现全局限流：

### Redis + Lua 脚本实现滑动窗口

```lua
-- redis_sliding_window.lua
local redis_lib = require "resty.redis"
local red = redis_lib:new()
red:set_timeouts(1000, 1000, 1000)
local ok, err = red:connect("127.0.0.1", 6379)
if not ok then
    ngx.log(ngx.ERR, "redis connect failed: ", err)
    return ngx.exit(500)
end

local key = "ratelimit:" .. ngx.var.remote_addr
local now = ngx.now()
local window = 10                   -- 10秒窗口
local limit = 100                   -- 100次请求

-- Redis Lua脚本: 原子操作
local script = [[
local key = KEYS[1]
local now = tonumber(ARGV[1])
local window = tonumber(ARGV[2])
local limit = tonumber(ARGV[3])

-- 移除窗口外的旧记录
redis.call('ZREMRANGEBYSCORE', key, 0, now - window)

-- 统计当前窗口内的请求数
local current = redis.call('ZCARD', key)

if current < limit then
    -- 记录当前请求(成员值=唯一ID, 分数=时间戳)
    redis.call('ZADD', key, now, now .. ':' .. math.random())
    redis.call('EXPIRE', key, window + 1)
    return {current + 1, limit - current - 1}
else
    return {current, 0}
end
]]

local result, err = red:eval(script, 1, key, now, window, limit)
if not result then
    ngx.log(ngx.ERR, "redis eval failed: ", err)
    return ngx.exit(500)
end

local count = result[1]
local remaining = result[2]

ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Limit"] = limit
ngx.header["X-RateLimit-Remaining"] = remaining

if tonumber(count) > limit then
    ngx.status = 429
    ngx.say('{"error":"rate limit exceeded"}')
    return ngx.exit(429)
end
```

### Redis 令牌桶 (RedisCell 算法)

如果使用 Redis 7+ 或 RedisCell 模块，可以直接使用高效的令牌桶：

```bash
# 安装 RedisCell 模块
redis-cli MODULE LOAD /path/to/libredis_cell.so
```

```lua
-- 使用 RedisCell 的 CL.THROTTLE 命令
local key = "throttle:" .. ngx.var.remote_addr
local max_burst = 20
local tokens_per_sec = 10
local result = red:call("CL.THROTTLE", key, max_burst, tokens_per_sec, 10, 1)

-- result: {0/1, total_tokens, remaining, retry_after, is_retryable}
-- 0 = 允许, 1 = 拒绝
if result[1] == 1 then
    ngx.header["Retry-After"] = result[4]
    return ngx.exit(429)
end
```

---

## 八、实战：组合限流方案

生产环境通常使用**多层级限流**：

```nginx
http {
    lua_shared_dict limit_store 10m;
    lua_shared_dict blacklist_store 1m;

    init_by_lua_block {
        require("init_rate_limit")     -- 初始化限流器
    }

    # 第一层: Nginx 内置限流(最外层, 性能最高)
    limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=l1_ip:10m rate=100r/s;
    limit_req_zone $server_name zone=l1_global:10m rate=1000r/s;

    server {
        # 第二层: IP 黑名单
        access_by_lua_block {
            local blacklisted = ngx.shared.blacklist_store:get(
                ngx.var.binary_remote_addr
            )
            if blacklisted then
                ngx.log(ngx.WARN, "blocked blacklisted ip: ",
                        ngx.var.remote_addr)
                return ngx.exit(403)
            end
        }

        # 第三层: 用户级令牌桶限流
        access_by_lua_block {
            local limiter = require("token_bucket").new({
                store = ngx.shared.limit_store,
                rate = 30,
                burst = 50,
            })
            local user_id = ngx.req.get_headers()["X-User-ID"]
            local key = user_id or ngx.var.remote_addr

            local ok, remaining = limiter:allow(key)
            if not ok then
                ngx.log(ngx.WARN, "user rate limited: ", key)
                return ngx.exit(429)
            end
        }

        # 第四层: 接口级限流(针对特定敏感接口)
        location /api/sensitive {
            limit_req zone=l1_ip burst=5 nodelay;    -- 更严格

            access_by_lua_block {
                local limiter = require("leaky_bucket").new({
                    store = ngx.shared.limit_store,
                    capacity = 10,
                    rate = 2,                            -- 极其严格
                })
                local ok = limiter:allow(ngx.var.remote_addr)
                if not ok then
                    return ngx.exit(429)
                end
            }

            proxy_pass http://backend;
        }

        location /api/normal {
            limit_req zone=l1_ip burst=20 nodelay;
            proxy_pass http://backend;
        }
    }
}
```

### 多层级架构图

```
                    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
                    │           用户请求                    │
                    └──────────────┬──────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
              │  L1: Nginx limit_req (IP维度的粗粒度限流)    │  ← 100 req/s per IP
              └────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
              │  L2: 黑名单检查 (IP/User 黑名单直接拒绝)      │
              └────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
              │  L3: 用户级别令牌桶 (30/s + burst 50)        │  ← 业务维度
              └────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
              ┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
              │  L4: 接口级别限流 (敏感接口更严格)             │  ← 接口维度
              └────────────────────┬───────────────────────┘
                                   ▼
                    ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
                    │           后端服务                    │
                    └─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 九、参数调优建议

| 场景 | 推荐算法 | rate 建议 | burst 建议 |
|------|---------|-----------|-----------|
| 公开 API | 令牌桶 | 根据SLA设定 | rate × 2 ~ 5 |
| 用户登录接口 | 滑动窗口 | 5-10/min | - |
| 支付/下单 | 漏桶 | 1-3/s | capacity = rate |
| 文件上传 | 连接数限制 | - | 1-3 并发 |
| 搜索接口 | 固定窗口 | 30-60/s | - |

---

## 十、监控与告警

```lua
-- 在限流逻辑中加入监控上报
function _M:allow_with_metrics(key)
    local allowed, info = self:allow(key)

    -- 上报限流指标到 Prometheus
    local metrics = {
        name = "rate_limit_total",
        labels = "endpoint=\"" .. ngx.var.uri .. "\",result=\""
                 .. (allowed and "pass" or "rejected") .. "\"",
        value = 1,
    }
    -- 写入共享内存供 Prometheus exporter 抓取
    local metric_store = ngx.shared.metrics_store
    local metric_key = metrics.name .. "{" .. metrics.labels .. "}"
    metric_store:incr(metric_key, metrics.value, 0, 60)

    return allowed, info
end
```

---

## 总结

| 算法 | 核心思想 | 选型建议 |
|------|---------|---------|
| **固定窗口** | 时间片独立计数 | 简单场景，对精度要求不高 |
| **滑动窗口** | 动态窗口统计 | 需要精确控制的场景 |
| **漏桶** | 恒定速率输出 | 保护后端服务，强制平滑 |
| **令牌桶** | 恒定速率输入 | 允许突发的 API 场景 |

> 生产环境建议：**Nginx 内置模块做第一道防线 + Lua 自定义逻辑做精细化控制 + Redis 做分布式全局限流**。

maven打包
content:
1, 打包jar文件, source, doc
```xml
<build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.8.1</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>${java.version}</source>
                    <target>${java.version}</target>
                    <encoding>${project.build.sourceEncoding}</encoding>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>

            <!-- 生成源码包 -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.2.1</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>attach-sources</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- 生成 javadoc 文档包 -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.2.0</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>attach-javadocs</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>jar</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
                <configuration>
                    <!-- 关键：注释不规范也不报错 -->
                    <failOnError>false</failOnError>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
```
2, 发布到私有maven仓库
```xml
<!-- 发布到私有仓库 -->
<distributionManagement>
    <!-- 正式版仓库 -->

        <name>公司私有发布仓库</name>
        <url>http://你的公司仓库地址/repository/maven-releases/</url>

    <!-- 快照版仓库（可选） -->

        <id>nexus-snapshots</id>
```


title: Maven Packaging
content:
1. Packaging JAR files, source, and docs

```xml
<build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.8.1</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>${java.version}</source>
                    <target>${java.version}</target>
                    <encoding>${project.build.sourceEncoding}</encoding>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Generate source jar -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.2.1</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>attach-sources</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Generate javadoc jar -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.2.0</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>attach-javadocs</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>jar</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
                <configuration>
                    <!-- Key: Don't fail on non-standard comments -->
                    <failOnError>false</failOnError>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
```

2. Publish to private Maven repository

```xml
<!-- Publish to private repository -->
<distributionManagement>
    <!-- Release repository -->
    <repository>
        <id>nexus-releases</id>
        <name>Company Private Release Repository</name>
        <url>http://your-company-repo-url/repository/maven-releases/</url>
    </repository>

    <!-- Snapshot repository (optional) -->
    <snapshotRepository>
        <id>nexus-snapshots</id>
        <name>Company Private Snapshot Repository</name>
        <url>http://your-company-repo-url/repository/maven-snapshots/</url>
    </snapshotRepository>
</distributionManagement>
```

```xml
<servers>
    <!-- Release repository credentials -->
    <server>
        <id>nexus-releases</id>
        <username>your-repo-username</username>
        <password>your-repo-password</password>
    </server>

    <!-- Snapshot repository credentials -->
    <server>
        <id>nexus-snapshots</id>
        <username>your-repo-username</username>
        <password>your-repo-password</password>
    </server>
</servers>
```

3. Publish to Maven Central

```xml
<plugin>
      <groupId>org.sonatype.central</groupId>
      <artifactId>central-publishing-maven-plugin</artifactId>
      <version>0.10.0</version>
      <extensions>true</extensions>
      <configuration>
        <!-- Must match the server id in your settings.xml exactly -->
        <publishingServerId>central</publishingServerId>
        <!-- Auto-publish to Maven Central after deployment, no manual step needed -->
        <autoPublish>true</autoPublish>
<!--        <tokenAuth>true</tokenAuth>-->
      </configuration>
    </plugin>
```

```xml
<servers>
  <server>
    <id>central</id>
    <username>${sonatype.username}</username>
    <password>${sonatype.password}</password>
  </server>
</servers>
```

title: wordedit
Word Editor
content:
## Word Editor Component

A Vue-based Word document editor component using the canvas-editor library for rendering and editing Word documents in the browser.

### Features

- Rich text formatting (bold, italic, underline, strikethrough)
- Font family and size selection
- Text color and highlight
- Text alignment (left, center, right, justify)
- Ordered and unordered lists
- Image insertion
- Hyperlink insertion
- Table operations
- Watermark support
- Page break insertion
- Search and replace
- Print support

### Component Structure

The editor component consists of:

1. **Toolbar**: Contains all formatting and editing controls
2. **Editor Area**: The main canvas-editor rendering area
3. **Search Popup**: Search and replace functionality

### Key Methods

```javascript
// Font operations
setFontName(val) { this.instance.command.executeFont(val) },
setSize(val) {
    const map = { 56: 'Initial', 48: 'Small Initial', 34: 'No.1', 16: 'Small 4', 14: 'No.5' }
    this.sizeName = map[val] || val
    this.instance.command.executeSize(val)
},
setBold() { this.instance.command.executeBold() },
setItalic() { this.instance.command.executeItalic() },
setUnderline(val) { this.instance.command.executeUnderline({ style: val }) },
setStrikeout() { this.instance.command.executeStrikeout() },
setSuperscript() { this.instance.command.executeSuperscript() },
setSubscript() { this.instance.command.executeSubscript() },
setColor(val) { this.instance.command.executeColor(val) },
setHighlight(val) { this.instance.command.executeHighlight(val) },
setAlign(val) { this.instance.command.executeRowFlex(val) },
```

### List Operations

```javascript
setList(val) {
    const [type, style] = val.split(',')
    this.instance.command.executeList(type, style)
},
```

### Image Insertion

```javascript
insertImage(e) {
    const file = e.target.files[0]
    if (!file) return
    const reader = new FileReader()
    reader.onload = (ev) => {
        const img = new Image()
        img.src = ev.target.result
        img.onload = () => {
            this.instance.command.executeImage({
                value: ev.target.result,
                width: img.width,
                height: img.height
            })
        }
    }
    reader.readAsDataURL(file)
    e.target.value = ''
},
```

### Hyperlink Insertion

```javascript
insertLink() {
    this.selectedLinkText = this.instance.command.getRangeText() || ''
    this.linkUrl = ''
    this.linkDialogVisible = true
},
handleLinkConfirm(data) {
    const { text, url } = data
    this.linkDialogVisible = false
    if (!url) return
    const size = this.sizeList.find(s => s.label === this.sizeName)?.value || 16
    this.instance.command.executeHyperlink({
        type: 'hyperlink',
        url: url,
        valueList: text.split('').map(t => ({ value: t, size }))
    })
},
```

### Other Operations

```javascript
insertSplitLine() { this.instance.command.executeSeparator([1]) },
addWatermark() { this.instance.command.executeAddWatermark({ data: 'Internal Document' }) },
insertPageBreak() { this.instance.command.executePageBreak() },
doPrint() { this.instance.command.executePrint() },
```

### Search and Replace

```javascript
doSearch() { this.instance.command.executeSearch(this.searchForm.key, this.searchOptions); this.setSearchResult() },
doSearchPrev() { this.instance.command.executeSearchNavigatePre(); this.setSearchResult() },
doSearchNext() { this.instance.command.executeSearchNavigateNext(); this.setSearchResult() },
doReplace() { this.instance.command.executeReplace(this.searchForm.replace, { index: this.searchInfo.index == 0 ? 0 : this.searchInfo.index - 1 }); this.setSearchResult() },
doReplaceAll() { this.instance.command.executeReplace(this.searchForm.replace); this.setSearchResult() },
```

### Get Content

```javascript
getAllData() {
    console.log('HTML', this.instance.command.getHTML())
    console.log('TEXT', this.instance.command.getText())
    this.$message.success('Data retrieved successfully')
}
```

title: UniApp Learning
uniapp学习
springai的学习笔记
content:
最近学习了springai的相关内容，记录一下。
我的项目地址 https://gitee.com/rednoob/spring-ai-study
已经实现的功能
- ✅ **RAG 智能对话**：基于向量知识库的准确回答
- ✅ **知识来源追溯**：支持显示回答的参考来源
- ✅ **本地化部署**：使用 Ollama 运行本地大模型，保护数据隐私
- ✅ **中文优化**：自定义中文文本分块器
- ✅ **批量处理**：优化的文档导入流程，避免内存溢出
- ✅ **API 文档**：Knife4j 接口文档，方便调试和测试
- ✅ **记忆功能**：支持对话记忆，上下文理解更自然
- ✅ **SpringCloud**：支持Spring Cloud 应用, nacos, loadbalancer, openfeign
- ✅ **多数据库支持**：整合mybatis-plus和dynamic-datasource
- ✅ **分布式事务**：整合Seata，支持分布式事务
- ✅ **日志**：集成p6spy，支持SQL日志、慢SQL报警、日志级别配置
- ✅ **定时任务**：集成Quartz，支持定时任务, 支持分布式任务
- ✅ **redis**：集成redis，支持分布式缓存、会话管理
- ✅ **redisson**：集成redisson，支持分布式锁、分布式集合
- ✅ **Jwt**：集成jwt，支持分布式认证
- ✅ **整合plumelog**：整合plumelog，支持分布式日志
- ✅ **其他功能**：集成MCP（Modelscope）, 集成Tool工具
- ❎ **其他功能**：整合LangChain4j

title: Spring AI Learning Notes
content:
## Spring AI Learning Notes

Spring AI is a framework for integrating AI capabilities into Spring applications. It provides a unified API for various AI services including chat models, embedding models, image generation, and more.

### Core Concepts

- **Chat Model**: Interface for conversational AI (e.g., OpenAI, Ollama)
- **Embedding Model**: Converts text to vector representations
- **Vector Store**: Stores and retrieves vector embeddings
- **RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)**: Combines retrieval with generation for context-aware responses
- **MCP (Model Context Protocol)**: Standardized protocol for AI model context management

### Spring AI with MCP Client

Spring AI supports MCP (Model Context Protocol) client integration:

```xml
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-ai-starter-mcp-client</artifactId>
    <version>${spring-ai.version}</version>
</dependency>
```

### Project Dependencies

For a Spring AI project, the following dependencies are typically needed:

```xml
<dependencies>
    <!-- Spring Boot Web -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Nacos Service Discovery -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.alibaba.cloud</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-alibaba-nacos-discovery</artifactId>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Nacos Configuration -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.alibaba.cloud</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-alibaba-nacos-config</artifactId>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Sentinel Circuit Breaker -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.alibaba.cloud</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-alibaba-sentinel</artifactId>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Spring Boot Starter Redis (Lettuce) -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-redis</artifactId>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Redis Connection Pool -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
        <artifactId>commons-pool2</artifactId>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Redisson -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.redisson</groupId>
        <artifactId>redisson-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
        <version>4.3.1</version>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Spring AI MCP Client -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-ai-starter-mcp-client</artifactId>
        <version>${spring-ai.version}</version>
    </dependency>

    <!-- JWT -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.auth0</groupId>
        <artifactId>java-jwt</artifactId>
        <version>4.5.1</version>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Distributed Logging -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.plumelog</groupId>
        <artifactId>plumelog-logback</artifactId>
        <version>3.5.3</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>com.plumelog</groupId>
        <artifactId>plumelog-trace</artifactId>
        <version>3.5.3</version>
    </dependency>

    <!-- Resilience4j Circuit Breaker -->
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-circuitbreaker-resilience4j</artifactId>
    </dependency>
</dependencies>
```

### Version Requirements

Spring AI requires a minimum of JDK 17:

- JDK 17
- Spring Boot 3.4.5
- Spring Cloud 2023.0.5
- Spring AI 1.0.0-M7
- Nacos 2.3.0

### Repositories

```xml
<repositories>
    <repository>
        <id>aliyunmaven</id>
        <url>https://maven.aliyun.com/repository/public</url>
        <releases><enabled>true</enabled></releases>
        <snapshots><enabled>false</enabled></snapshots>
    </repository>
    <repository>
        <id>spring-milestones</id>
        <name>Spring Milestones</name>
        <url>https://repo.spring.io/milestone</url>
        <snapshots><enabled>false</enabled></snapshots>
    </repository>
</repositories>
```

title: How to Use OpenResty
openresty 如何使用
项目启动jar
content:
项目启动 通过jar方式启动

```` shell
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# ===================== 配置部分 =====================
JAVA_EXE=/usr/local/java/jdk1.8.0_431/bin/java
JAR_PATH="/usr/local/123.jar"
LOG_FILE="/usr/local/app.log"
JAVA_OPTS="-Xms1g -Xmx8g -Dspring.profiles.active=prod"
#等待项目启动时间
STOP_TIMEOUT=120
PID_FILE="/usr/local/123.pid"

# ===================== 获取PID =====================
get_pid() {
    if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then
        local pid=$(cat "$PID_FILE")
        if ps -p "$pid" > /dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q "java .*$JAR_PATH" /proc/"$pid"/cmdline 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "$pid"
            return
        fi
        rm -f "$PID_FILE"
    fi
    pgrep -f "^$JAVA_EXE .* -jar $JAR_PATH\$"
}

# ===================== 启动 =====================
start() {
    local PID=$(get_pid)
    if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
        echo "Application is already running, PID=$PID"
        exit 0
    fi

    echo "Starting application..."
    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOG_FILE")"
    nohup "$JAVA_EXE" $JAVA_OPTS -jar "$JAR_PATH" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 &
    local NEW_PID=$!
    echo "$NEW_PID" > "$PID_FILE"

    sleep 3
    if ps -p "$NEW_PID" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "Application started successfully, PID=$NEW_PID"
    else
        echo "Failed to start application, please check log: $LOG_FILE"
        rm -f "$PID_FILE"
        exit 1
    fi
}

# ===================== 停止 =====================
stop() {
    local PID=$(get_pid)
    if [ -z "$PID" ]; then
        echo "Application is not running"
        exit 0
    fi

    echo "Stopping application (PID=$PID), waiting up to $STOP_TIMEOUT seconds..."
    kill "$PID"

    local count=0
    while ps -p "$PID" > /dev/null 2>&1 && [ $count -lt $STOP_TIMEOUT ]; do
        sleep 1
        count=$((count + 1))
        echo -n "."
    done
    echo ""

    if ps -p "$PID" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "Stop timeout, killing process (PID=$PID)"
        kill -9 "$PID"
        sleep 2
    fi

    rm -f "$PID_FILE"
    echo "Application stopped"
}

# ===================== 重启 =====================
restart() {
    echo "Restarting application..."
    stop
    sleep 2
    start
}

# ===================== 状态 =====================
status() {
    local PID=$(get_pid)
    if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
        echo "Application is running, PID=$PID"
        exit 0
    else
        echo "Application is not running"
        exit 1
    fi
}

# ===================== 主逻辑 =====================
case "$1" in
    start) start ;;
    stop) stop ;;
    restart) restart ;;
    status) status ;;
    *)
        echo "Usage: $0 {start|stop|restart|status}"
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

````

title: Project JAR Deployment
content:
Starting a project via JAR file.

```` shell
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# ===================== Configuration =====================
JAVA_EXE=/usr/local/java/jdk1.8.0_431/bin/java
JAR_PATH="/usr/local/123.jar"
LOG_FILE="/usr/local/app.log"
JAVA_OPTS="-Xms1g -Xmx8g -Dspring.profiles.active=prod"
# Wait time for application startup
STOP_TIMEOUT=120
PID_FILE="/usr/local/123.pid"

# ===================== Get PID =====================
get_pid() {
    if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then
        local pid=$(cat "$PID_FILE")
        if ps -p "$pid" > /dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q "java .*$JAR_PATH" /proc/"$pid"/cmdline 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "$pid"
            return
        fi
        rm -f "$PID_FILE"
    fi
    pgrep -f "^$JAVA_EXE .* -jar $JAR_PATH\$"
}

# ===================== Start =====================
start() {
    local PID=$(get_pid)
    if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
        echo "Application is already running, PID=$PID"
        exit 0
    fi

    echo "Starting application..."
    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOG_FILE")"
    nohup "$JAVA_EXE" $JAVA_OPTS -jar "$JAR_PATH" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 &
    local NEW_PID=$!
    echo "$NEW_PID" > "$PID_FILE"

    sleep 3
    if ps -p "$NEW_PID" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "Application started successfully, PID=$NEW_PID"
    else
        echo "Failed to start application, please check log: $LOG_FILE"
        rm -f "$PID_FILE"
        exit 1
    fi
}

# ===================== Stop =====================
stop() {
    local PID=$(get_pid)
    if [ -z "$PID" ]; then
        echo "Application is not running"
        exit 0
    fi

    echo "Stopping application (PID=$PID), waiting up to $STOP_TIMEOUT seconds..."
    kill "$PID"

    local count=0
    while ps -p "$PID" > /dev/null 2>&1 && [ $count -lt $STOP_TIMEOUT ]; do
        sleep 1
        count=$((count + 1))
        echo -n "."
    done
    echo ""

    if ps -p "$PID" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "Stop timeout, killing process (PID=$PID)"
        kill -9 "$PID"
        sleep 2
    fi

    rm -f "$PID_FILE"
    echo "Application stopped"
}

# ===================== Restart =====================
restart() {
    echo "Restarting application..."
    stop
    sleep 2
    start
}

# ===================== Status =====================
status() {
    local PID=$(get_pid)
    if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
        echo "Application is running, PID=$PID"
        exit 0
    else
        echo "Application is not running"
        exit 1
    fi
}

# ===================== Main Logic =====================
case "$1" in
    start) start ;;
    stop) stop ;;
    restart) restart ;;
    status) status ;;
    *)
        echo "Usage: $0 {start|stop|restart|status}"
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

````

title: daily260403
content:
项目中使用gateway做路由
所以我学习了一下spring cloud gateway
gateway是一个进行路由的框架
spring-cloud-starter-gateway
搭配hystrix做断路器, 进行雪崩处理
搭配ribbon做负载均衡
搭配redis做限流
搭配actuator做监控
搭配nacos做服务发现
我们现在的项目是 jdk8, springbootHoxton.SR12, gateway3.1.3, hystrix2.2.9.RELEASE,  ribbon2.2.9.RELEASE, 
nacos2.2.5.RELEASE + openfeign 2.2.9.RELEASE

- hystrix可以用sentinel来替代
- ribbon可以用Spring Cloud LoadBalancer来替代

未来如果是我负责架构
JDK 8 + Spring Boot 2.7.18 + Spring Cloud 2021.0.9 + Spring Cloud Gateway 3.1.9 
+ Nacos 2.3.0 + Spring Cloud LoadBalancer  3.1.9 + Spring Cloud Sentinel 2021.0.1.0 
+ OpenFeign 3.1.9

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0
         http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>com.example</groupId>
    <artifactId>demo-cloud-parent</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>pom</packaging>
    <name>demo-cloud-parent</name>
    <description>JDK8 + Spring Cloud 2021.0.9 稳定架构</description>

    <!-- 统一版本管理 -->
    <properties>
        <java.version>1.8</java.version>
        <maven.compiler.source>1.8</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>1.8</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>

        <!-- 核心版本严格锁定 -->
        <spring.boot.version>2.7.18</spring.boot.version>
        <spring.cloud.version>2021.0.9</spring.cloud.version>
        <spring.cloud.alibaba.version>2021.0.1.0</spring.cloud.alibaba.version>
        <nacos.version>2.3.0</nacos.version>
    </properties>

    <!-- 依赖管理：所有版本统一在这里控制，子模块不用写 version -->
    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <!-- Spring Boot -->
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId>
                <version>${spring.boot.version}</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>

            <!-- Spring Cloud -->
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>
                <version>${spring.cloud.version}</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>

            <!-- Spring Cloud Alibaba + Nacos + Sentinel -->
            <dependency>
                <groupId>com.alibaba.cloud</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-cloud-alibaba-dependencies</artifactId>
                <version>${spring.cloud.alibaba.version}</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- 通用基础依赖（所有微服务都能用） -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Nacos 注册发现 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.alibaba.cloud</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-alibaba-nacos-discovery</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Nacos 配置中心 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.alibaba.cloud</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-alibaba-nacos-config</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- LoadBalancer 负载均衡（替代 Ribbon） -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-loadbalancer</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- OpenFeign 服务调用 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-openfeign</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Sentinel 熔断限流 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.alibaba.cloud</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-alibaba-sentinel</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- 工具类 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>cn.hutool</groupId>
            <artifactId>hutool-all</artifactId>
            <version>5.8.23</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- 测试 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${spring.boot.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>repackage</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.8.1</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>1.8</source>
                    <target>1.8</target>
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

    <!-- 阿里云仓库，下载更快 -->
    <repositories>
        <repository>
            <id>aliyunmaven</id>
            <name>Aliyun Maven</name>
            <url>https://maven.aliyun.com/repository/public</url>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository>
            <id>aliyunmaven</id>
            <name>Aliyun Maven</name>
            <url>https://maven.aliyun.com/repository/public</url>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </pluginRepository>
    </pluginRepositories>
</project>
```

title: Spring Cloud Gateway Learning Notes
content:
The project uses Gateway for routing, so I studied Spring Cloud Gateway.

Gateway is a routing framework.
spring-cloud-starter-gateway

- Combined with Hystrix as a circuit breaker for avalanche prevention
- Combined with Ribbon for load balancing
- Combined with Redis for rate limiting
- Combined with Actuator for monitoring
- Combined with Nacos for service discovery

Our current project stack: JDK 8, Spring Boot Hoxton.SR12, Gateway 3.1.3, Hystrix 2.2.9.RELEASE, Ribbon 2.2.9.RELEASE, Nacos 2.2.5.RELEASE + OpenFeign 2.2.9.RELEASE

- Hystrix can be replaced with Sentinel
- Ribbon can be replaced with Spring Cloud LoadBalancer

If I were responsible for the architecture in the future:

JDK 8 + Spring Boot 2.7.18 + Spring Cloud 2021.0.9 + Spring Cloud Gateway 3.1.9 + Nacos 2.3.0 + Spring Cloud LoadBalancer 3.1.9 + Spring Cloud Sentinel 2021.0.1.0 + OpenFeign 3.1.9

title: poi-tl
content:
# Poi-tl Documentation

> ## Excerpt
> Word template engine

---

Plugins, also known as **custom functions**, allow users to execute pre-defined functions at template tag positions. Thanks to the plugin mechanism, we can perform virtually any operation at any position in the template.

---

Plugins are the core mechanism of poi-tl. All data rendering in this documentation is implemented through built-in plugins.

## Basic Usage

### Text Tag `{{var}}`

Data model: `String`

```java
put("var", "hello world");
```

### Image Tag `{{@var}}`

Data model: `PictureRenderData`

```java
put("var", Pictures.ofLocal("logo.png").size(100, 120).create());
```

### Table Tag `{{#var}}`

Data model: `TableRenderData`

```java
put("var", Tables.of(new String[][] {
    new String[] { "Name", "Age" },
    new String[] { "Tom", "18" },
}).create());
```

### Numbering Tag `{{*var}}`

Data model: `NumberingRenderData`

```java
put("var", Numberings.create("Plug-in architecture",
    "Supports word template engine",
    "More powerful than traditional template engines"));
```

### Document Tag `{{+var}}`

Data model: `DocxRenderData`

```java
put("var", Includes.ofLocal("detail.docx")
    .setRenderModel(createDetailDataModel()).create());
```

## Advanced Features

### Loop Row

In a Word table, if you want to render a list into rows, you can use the loop row feature:

```java
put("var", Tables.of(new String[][] {
    new String[] { "Name", "Age" }
}).create());

RowRenderData row = Rows.of("Tom", "18").create();
put("var", Tables.create(row, row, row));
```

### Dynamic Table

Use `TableRenderPolicy` to dynamically create table rows:

```java
Configure config = Configure.builder()
    .bind("detail_table", new DetailTablePolicy())
    .build();
```

### Comment Plugin

`CommentRenderPolicy` is a built-in plugin that provides full comment functionality support.

Data model: `CommentRenderData`

Comments support adding text, images, and other document content.

### Attachment Plugin

`AttachmentRenderPolicy` is a built-in plugin that supports inserting attachments.

Data model: `AttachmentRenderData`

Inserts an Excel file into the document; double-click the icon to open the attachment.

### Code Highlighting

`HighlightRenderPolicy` plugin provides syntax highlighting for code blocks in Word documents.

Dependency:

```
<dependency>
  <groupId>com.deepoove</groupId>
  <artifactId>poi-tl-plugin-highlight</artifactId>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
</dependency>
```

Data model: `HighlightRenderData`

Supports 20+ programming languages and dozens of theme styles.

Common language support: apache, bash, cpp, cs, css, diff, go, groovy, http, ini, java, javascript, json, makefile, markdown, objectivec, perl, php, python, ruby, scala, shell, sql, xml, yaml

Common theme styles: github, idea, zenburn, androidstudio, solarized-light, solarized-dark, xcode, vs, agate, darcula, dark, dracula, foundation, googlecode, monokai, mono-blue, far, gml

### Markdown Plugin

`MarkdownRenderPolicy` plugin supports generating Word documents from Markdown.

Dependency:

```
<dependency>
  <groupId>com.deepoove</groupId>
  <artifactId>poi-tl-plugin-markdown</artifactId>
  <version>1.0.3</version>
</dependency>
```

Data model: `MarkdownRenderData`

Converts Markdown content to Word documents.

title: poi-tl
dynamic-datasorce
content:
# dynamic-datasource文档

---
dynamic-datasource-spring-boot-starter 是一个基于springboot的快速集成多数据源的启动器。

这里整理出文档。

## 特性

1.  支持 `数据源分组` ，适用于多种场景，纯粹多库、读写分离、一主多从、混合模式。
2.  支持数据库敏感配置信息 `加密(可自定义)` ENC()。
3.  支持每个数据库独立初始化表结构schema和数据库database。
4.  支持无数据源启动，支持`懒加载数据源`（需要的时候再创建连接）。
5.  支持 `自定义注解` ，需继承DS(3.2.0+)。
6.  提供并简化对Druid，HikariCp，BeeCp，Dbcp2的快速集成。
7.  提供对`Mybatis-Plus`，Quartz，ShardingJdbc，P6sy，Jndi等组件的集成方案。
8.  提供 `自定义数据源来源` 方案（如全从数据库加载）。
9.  提供项目启动后 `动态增加移除数据源` 方案。
10.  提供Mybatis环境下的 `纯读写分离` 方案。
11.  提供使用 `spel动态参数` 解析数据源方案。内置spel，session，header，支持自定义。
12.  支持 `多层数据源嵌套切换` 。（ServiceA >>> ServiceB >>> ServiceC）。
13.  提供 `基于seata的分布式事务方案` 。
14.  提供 `本地多数据源事务方案`。

## 约定

1.  dynamic-datasource只做 `切换数据源` 这件核心的事情，并`不限制你的具体操作`，切换了数据源可以做任何CRUD。
2.  配置文件所有以下划线 `_` 分割的数据源 `首部` 即为组的名称，相同组名称的数据源会放在一个组下。
3.  切换数据源可以是组名，也可以是具体数据源名称。`组名则切换时采用负载均衡算法切换`。
4.  默认的数据源名称为 `master` ，你可以通过 `spring.datasource.dynamic.primary` 修改。
5.  `方法上的注解优先于类上注解`。
6.  DS支持继承抽象类上的DS，暂不支持继承接口上的DS。

## 使用方法

1、引入dynamic-datasource-spring-boot-starter

spring-boot 1.5.x、2.x.x

```xml
<dependency>
  <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
  <artifactId>dynamic-datasource-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
  <version>${version}</version>
</dependency>
```

spring-boot3及以上

```xml
<dependency>
  <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
  <artifactId>dynamic-datasource-spring-boot3-starter</artifactId>
  <version>${version}</version>
</dependency>
```

2、配置数据源

```yaml
spring:
  datasource:
    dynamic:
      primary: master # 设置默认的数据源或者数据源组,默认值即为master
      strict: false # 严格匹配数据源,默认false. true未匹配到指定数据源时抛异常,false使用默认数据源
      datasource:
        master:
          url: jdbc:mysql://xx.xx.xx.xx:3306/dynamic
          username: root
          password: 123456
          driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver # 3.2.0开始支持SPI可省略此配置
        slave_1:
          url: jdbc:mysql://xx.xx.xx.xx:3307/dynamic
          username: root
          password: 123456
          driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
        slave_2:
          url: ENC(xxxxx) # 内置加密,使用请查看详细文档
          username: ENC(xxxxx)
          password: ENC(xxxxx)
          driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
       # ......省略
       # 以上会配置一个默认库master，一个组slave下有两个子库slave_1,slave_2
```

```yaml
# 多主多从
spring: 
  datasource:
    dynamic:
      datasource:
        master_1:
        master_2:
        slave_1:
        slave_2:
        slave_3:
```

```yaml
# 纯粹多库（记得设置primary）
spring: 
  datasource:   
    dynamic:
      datasource:
        mysql: 
        oracle:
        sqlserver: 
        postgresql:
        h2:
```

```yaml
# 混合配置
spring: 
  datasource:   
    dynamic:
      datasource:
        master: 
        slave_1:
        slave_2: 
        oracle_1:
        oracle_2:
```

3、使用 `@DS` 切换数据源

`@DS` 可以注解在方法上或类上，同时存在`就近原则`，`方法上注解` 优先于 `类上注解`。

|注解|结果|
|---|---|
|没有@DS|默认数据源|
|@DS("dsName")|dsName可以为组名也可以为具体某个库的名称，组名则切换时采用负载均衡算法切换。|

```java
@Service
@DS("slave")
public class UserServiceImpl implements UserService {

  @Autowired
  private JdbcTemplate jdbcTemplate;

  // 使用slave数据源
  public List selectAll() {
    return  jdbcTemplate.queryForList("select * from user");
  }
  
  // 使用slave_1数据源
  @Override
  @DS("slave_1")
  public List selectByCondition() {
    return  jdbcTemplate.queryForList("select * from user where age >10");
  }
}
```

## DS放在哪里合适

DS作为切换数据源核心注解，我应该把他注解在哪里合适？

这其实是初次接触多数据源的人常问的问题。

这其实没有一定的要求，只是有一些经验之谈。

首先开发者要了解的基础知识是，DS注解是基于AOP的原理实现的，aop的常见失效场景应清楚，比如内部调用失效，shiro代理失效。

`通常建议DS放在serviceImpl的方法上，如事务注解一样。`

## 注解在Controller的方法上或类上

并不是不可以，作者并不建议的原因主要是controller主要作用是参数的检验等一些基础逻辑的处理，这部分操作常常并不涉及数据库。

## 注解在service的实现类的方法或类上

这是作者建议的方式，service主要是对业务的处理， 在复杂的场景涉及连续切换不同的数据库。

如果你的方法有通用性，其他service也会调用你的方法。 这样别人就不用重复处理切换数据源。

## 注解在Mapper上

通常如果你某个Mapper对应的表只在确定的一个库，也是可以的，但是建议只注解在Mapper的类上。

我之前出现多线程失效场景的时候，就是在Mapper上加了注解解决的。

## 其他使用方式

### 继承抽象类上的DS

比如我有一个抽象Service，我想实现继承我这个抽象Service下的子Service的所有方法除非重新指定，都用我抽象Service上注解的数据源。是否支持？

答：支持。

### 继承接口上的DS

3.4.1开始支持， 但是需要注意的是，一个类能实现多个接口，如果多个接口都有DS会如何？

不知道，别这么干。一般不会有人这么干吧，想一想都知道会出问题。

## 连接池集成

传统多数据源集成连接池如果需要配置的参数较多，则手动编码量大，编程复杂。

dynamic-datasource实现了常见数据源的参数配置，支持全局配置每个数据源继承。

通过本章您可以快速掌握不同连接池的集成配置方案和继承中可能遇见的问题。

## 连接池必读

1.  每个数据源都有一个type来指定连接池。

2.  每个数据源甚至可以使用不同的连接池，如无特殊需要并不建议。

3.  type `不是必填字段`。


在没有设置type的时候系统会自动按以下顺序查找并使用连接池：

`Druid` > `HikariCp` > `BeeCp` > `DBCP2` > `Spring Basic`。

```yaml
spring:
  datasource:
    dynamic:
      primary: db1 
      datasource:
        db1:
          url: jdbc:mysql://xx.xx.xx.xx:3306/dynamic
          username: root
          password: 123456
          driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
          type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource     # 使用Hikaricp
        db2:
          url: jdbc:mysql://xx.xx.xx.xx:3307/dynamic
          username: root
          password: 123456
          driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
          type: com.alibaba.druid.pool.DruidDataSource # 使用Druid
        db3:
          url: jdbc:mysql://xx.xx.xx.xx:3308/dynamic
          username: root
          password: 123456
          driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
          type: cn.beecp.BeeDataSource                 # 使用beecp
```

## 集成Druid

### 基础介绍

Druid Github：[点我跳转](https://github.com/alibaba/druid)

Druid 文档：[点我跳转](https://github.com/alibaba/druid/wiki/%E9%A6%96%E9%A1%B5)

dynamic-datasource能`简单高效`完成对Druid的集成并完成其参数的多元化配置。

1.  各个库可以使用不同的数据库连接池，如 `master使用Druid，slave使用HikariCP`。

2.  如果项目同时存在Druid和HikariCP并且未配置连接池type类型，`默认Druid优先于HikariCP`。


### 集成步骤

1、项目引入 `druid-spring-boot-starter` 依赖

```xml
<dependency>
    <groupId>com.alibaba</groupId>
    <artifactId>druid-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
    <version>${version}</version>
</dependency>
```

2、排除原生Druid的快速配置类

注意：`v3.3.3及以上`版本不用排除了。

```java
@SpringBootApplication(exclude = DruidDataSourceAutoConfigure.class)
public class Application {

  public static void main(String[] args) {
    SpringApplication.run(Application.class, args);
  }
    
}
```

某些SpringBoot的版本上面可能无法排除可用以下方式排除。

```yaml
spring:
  autoconfigure:
    exclude: com.alibaba.druid.spring.boot.autoconfigure.DruidDataSourceAutoConfigure
```

3、参数配置

1.  如果参数都未配置，则保持原组件默认值。
2.  如果配置了全局参数，则每一个数据源都会继承对应参数。
3.  每一个数据源可以单独设置参数覆盖全局参数。

```yaml
spring:
  datasource:
    druid:
      stat-view-servlet:
        enabled: true
        loginUsername: admin
        loginPassword: 123456
    dynamic:
      druid: # 以下是支持的全局默认值
        initial-size:
        max-active:
        min-idle:
        max-wait:
        time-between-eviction-runs-millis:
        time-between-log-stats-millis:
        stat-sqlmax-size:
        min-evictable-idle-time-millis:
        max-evictable-idle-time-millis:
        test-while-idle:
        test-on-borrow:
        test-on-return:
        validation-query:
        validation-query-timeout:
        use-global-datasource-stat:
        async-init:
        clear-filters-enable:
        reset-stat-enable:
        not-full-timeout-retry-count:
        max-wait-thread-count:
        fail-fast:
        phyTimeout-millis:
        keep-alive:
        pool-prepared-statements:
        init-variants:
        init-global-variants:
        use-unfair-lock:
        kill-when-socket-read-timeout:
        connection-properties:
        max-pool-prepared-statement-per-connection-size:
        init-connection-sqls:
        share-prepared-statements:
        connection-errorretry-attempts:
        break-after-acquire-failure:
        filters: stat # 注意这个值和druid原生不一致，默认启动了stat
        wall:
            noneBaseStatementAllow:
            callAllow:
            selectAllow:
            selectIntoAllow:
            selectIntoOutfileAllow:
            selectWhereAlwayTrueCheck:
            selectHavingAlwayTrueCheck:
            selectUnionCheck:
            selectMinusCheck:
            selectExceptCheck:
            selectIntersectCheck:
            createTableAllow:
            dropTableAllow:
            alterTableAllow:
            renameTableAllow:
            hintAllow:
            lockTableAllow:
            startTransactionAllow:
            blockAllow:
            conditionAndAlwayTrueAllow:
            conditionAndAlwayFalseAllow:
            conditionDoubleConstAllow:
            conditionLikeTrueAllow:
            selectAllColumnAllow:
            deleteAllow:
            deleteWhereAlwayTrueCheck:
            deleteWhereNoneCheck:
            updateAllow:
            updateWhereAlayTrueCheck:
            updateWhereNoneCheck:
            insertAllow:
            mergeAllow:
            minusAllow:
            intersectAllow:
            replaceAllow:
            setAllow:
            commitAllow:
            rollbackAllow:
            useAllow:
            multiStatementAllow:
            truncateAllow:
            commentAllow:
            strictSyntaxCheck:
            constArithmeticAllow:
            limitZeroAllow:
            describeAllow:
            showAllow:
            schemaCheck:
            tableCheck:
            functionCheck:
            objectCheck:
            variantCheck:
            mustParameterized:
            doPrivilegedAllow:
            dir:
            tenantTablePattern:
            tenantColumn:
            wrapAllow:
            metadataAllow:
            conditionOpXorAllow:
            conditionOpBitwseAllow:
            caseConditionConstAllow:
            completeInsertValuesCheck:
            insertValuesCheckSize:
            selectLimit:
        stat:
          merge-sql:
          log-slow-sql:
          slow-sql-millis: 
      datasource:
        master:
          username: root
          password: 123456
          driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
          url: jdbc:mysql://xx.xx.xx.xx:3306/dynamic?characterEncoding=utf8&useSSL=false
          druid: # 以下是独立参数，每个库可以重新设置
            initial-size: 20
            validation-query: select 1 FROM DUAL # 比如oracle就需要重新设置这个
            public-key: #（非全局参数）设置即表示启用加密,底层会自动帮你配置相关的连接参数和filter，推荐使用本项目自带的加密方法。
```

以下是我曾经配置过的示例：

```yaml
# 数据源配置
spring:
    # 排除掉druid原生的自动配置
    autoconfigure:
        exclude: com.alibaba.druid.spring.boot.autoconfigure.DruidDataSourceAutoConfigure
    datasource:
    	druid:
        # 初始连接数
        initialSize: 5
        # 最小连接池数量
        minIdle: 10
        # 最大连接池数量
        maxActive: 20
        # 配置获取连接等待超时的时间
        maxWait: 60000
        # 配置连接超时时间
        connectTimeout: 30000
        # 配置网络超时时间
        socketTimeout: 60000
        # 配置间隔多久才进行一次检测，检测需要关闭的空闲连接，单位是毫秒
        timeBetweenEvictionRunsMillis: 60000
        # 配置一个连接在池中最小生存的时间，单位是毫秒
        minEvictableIdleTimeMillis: 300000
        # 配置一个连接在池中最大生存的时间，单位是毫秒
        maxEvictableIdleTimeMillis: 900000
        # 配置检测连接是否有效
        validationQuery: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
        testWhileIdle: true
        testOnBorrow: false
        testOnReturn: false
        webStatFilter:
            enabled: true
        statViewServlet:
            enabled: true
            # 设置白名单，不填则允许所有访问
            allow:
            url-pattern: /druid/*
            # 控制台管理用户名和密码
            login-username: admin
            login-password: 123456
        filter:
            stat:
                enabled: true
                # 慢SQL记录
                log-slow-sql: true
                slow-sql-millis: 2000
                merge-sql: true
            wall:
                config:
                    multi-statement-allow: true
        dynamic:
            druid:
                # 初始连接数
                initial-size: 5
                # 最小连接池数量
                min-idle: 10
                # 最大连接池数量
                max-active: 20
                # 配置获取连接等待超时的时间
                max-wait: 60000
                # 配置间隔多久才进行一次检测，检测需要关闭的空闲连接，单位是毫秒
                time-between-eviction-runs-millis: 60000
                # 配置一个连接在池中最小生存的时间，单位是毫秒
                min-evictable-idle-time-millis: 300000
                # 配置一个连接在池中最大生存的时间，单位是毫秒
                max-evictable-idle-time-millis: 900000
                # 配置检测连接是否有效
                validation-query: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
                test-while-idle: true
                test-on-borrow: false
                test-on-return: false
                # 打开PSCache，并指定每个连接上PSCache的大小。
                # oracle设为true，mysql设为false。分库分表较多推荐设置为false
                pool-prepared-statements: false
                max-pool-prepared-statement-per-connection-size: 20
                filters: stat # 注意这个值和druid原生不一致，默认启动了stat
                stat:
                  merge-sql: true
                  log-slow-sql: true
                  slow-sql-millis: 2000
            primary: master # 设置默认的数据源或者数据源组
            strict: false # 设置严格模式,默认false不启动,启动后在未匹配到指定数据源时候回抛出异常,不启动会使用默认数据源
            datasource:
                master:
                    url: jdbc:mysql://192.168.56.101:3306/master?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&zeroDateTimeBehavior=convertToNull&useSSL=true&serverTimezone=GMT%2B8
                    username: root
                    password: root
                    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
                slave_1:
                    url: jdbc:mysql://192.168.56.102:3306/slave_1?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&zeroDateTimeBehavior=convertToNull&useSSL=true&serverTimezone=GMT%2B8&rewriteBatchedStatements=true
                    username: root
                    password: root
                    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
                slave_2:
                    url: jdbc:mysql://192.168.56.103:3306/slave_2?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&zeroDateTimeBehavior=convertToNull&useSSL=true&serverTimezone=GMT%2B8&rewriteBatchedStatements=true
                    username: root
                    password: root
                    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
                    druid: # 以下参数针对每个库可以重新设置druid参数
                        initial-size:
                        validation-query: select 1 FROM DUAL # 比如oracle就需要重新设置这个
                        public-key: #（非全局参数）设置即表示启用加密,底层会自动帮你配置相关的连接参数和filter。
```

如上即可配置访问用户和密码，访问 `http://ip:端口/druid/index.html` 查看druid监控。

## 集成HikariCP

### 基础介绍

HikariCP Github：[点我跳转](https://github.com/brettwooldridge/HikariCP)

HikariCP 文档：[点我跳转](https://github.com/brettwooldridge/HikariCP/wiki)

### 集成步骤

1、项目引入 `HikariCP` 依赖

`SpringBoot2.x.x`默认引入了HikariCP，除非对版本有要求无需再次引入。

`SpringBoot 1.5.x`需手动引入，对应的版本请根据自己环境和HikariCP官方文档自行选择。

```java
<dependency>
    <groupId>com.zaxxer</groupId>
    <artifactId>HikariCP</artifactId>
    <version>${version}</version>
</dependency>
```

2、参数配置

1.  如果参数都未配置，则保持原组件默认值。
2.  如果配置了全局参数，则每一个数据源都会继承对应参数。
3.  每一个数据源可以单独设置参数覆盖全局参数。

特别注意，hikaricp原生设置某些字段名和dynamic-datasource不一致，dynamic-datasource是根据参数反射设置，而原生hikaricp字段名称和set名称不一致。

```yaml
spring:
  datasource:
    dynamic:
      hikari:  # 全局hikariCP参数，所有值和默认保持一致。(现已支持的参数如下,不清楚含义不要乱设置)
        catalog:
        connection-timeout:
        validation-timeout:
        idle-timeout:
        leak-detection-threshold:
        max-lifetime:
        max-pool-size:
        min-idle:
        initialization-fail-timeout:
        connection-init-sql:
        connection-test-query:
        dataSource-class-name:
        dataSource-jndi-name:
        schema:
        transaction-isolation-name:
        is-auto-commit:
        is-read-only:
        is-isolate-internal-queries:
        is-register-mbeans:
        is-allow-pool-suspension:
        data-source-properties: 
        health-check-properties:
      datasource:
        master:
          username: root
          password: 123456
          driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
          url: jdbc:mysql://xx.xx.xx.xx:3306/dynamic?characterEncoding=utf8&useSSL=false
          hikari: # 以下参数针对每个库可以重新设置hikari参数
            max-pool-size:
            idle-timeout:
#           ......
```

### 常见问题

Failed to validate connection com.mysql.jdbc.JDBC4Connection@xxxxx (No operations allowed after connection closed.)

[https://github.com/brettwooldridge/HikariCP/issues/1034](https://github.com/brettwooldridge/HikariCP/issues/1034)

核心意思就是HikariCP要设置 connection-test-query 并且max-lifetime要小于mysql的默认时间。

## 第三方集成

通过本章您可以掌握数据源在集成MybatisPlus，Quartz，ShardingJdbc的方案。

## 集成MybatisPlus

### 基础介绍

MybatisPlus Github：[点我跳转](https://github.com/baomidou/mybatis-plus)

MybatisPlus 文档 [点我跳转](https://mybatis.plus/)

> 只要引入了MybatisPlus相关jar包，项目自动集成，兼容MybatisPlus2.x和3.x的版本。

### 集成步骤

1、项目引入 `Mybatis-Plus` 依赖

```xml
<dependency>
    <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
    <artifactId>mybatis-plus-boot-starter</artifactId>
    <version>${version}</version>
</dependency>
```

2、使用`DS`注解进行切换数据源

```java
@Service
@DS("mysql")
public class UserServiceImpl extends ServiceImpl<UserMapper, User> implements UserService {

    @DS("oracle")
    publid void addUser(User user){
        //do something
        baseMapper.insert(user);
    }
}
```

3、分页配置

```java
@Bean
public MybatisPlusInterceptor mybatisPlusInterceptor() {
    MybatisPlusInterceptor interceptor = new MybatisPlusInterceptor();
    //如果是不同类型的库，请不要指定DbType，其会自动判断。
    interceptor.addInnerInterceptor(new PaginationInnerInterceptor());
   // interceptor.addInnerInterceptor(new PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL));
    return interceptor;
}
```

### 注意事项

MybatisPlus内置的ServiceImpl在新增，更改，删除等一些方法上自带事物导致不能切换数据源。

解决方法：

方法1：复制ServiceImpl出来为自己的MyServiceImpl，并去掉所有事务注解。

方法2：创建一个新方法，并在此方法上加DS注解. 如上面的`addUser`方法。

### FAQ

#### 为什么要单独拿出来说和MybatisPlus的集成？

因为MybatisPlus重写了一些核心类，必须通过解析获得真实的代理对象。

如果自己写多数据源，则很难完成与mp的集成。
